% BEGIN AUTOGENERATED SCALE STRUCTURAL CORE
\subsection{Migration-Scale Corpus (RQ1b)}\label{sec:eval-large-scale}

Hand-picked witnesses do not establish migration-scale trust.  The artifact
therefore includes a deterministic generator
(\texttt{src/ub\_oracle/large\_scale\_study.py}) that enumerates
\textbf{60{,}000} genuinely distinct
C$\to$\{Rust,Go\} programs totaling \textbf{1{,}044{,}000}
counted source+target LOC.  The generator bakes \emph{defined} operands into
each source file and reads only the UB-triggering operand from \texttt{argv};
the census is therefore a structural claim, not a sampling estimate.
Every program hash is unique (60{,}000/60{,}000), and the declared labels are deliberately
balanced: 29{,}600 divergent vs. 30{,}400 equivalent (1.33\% delta).

\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\small
\caption{Migration-scale corpus census, generated directly by
\texttt{paper\_scale\_section.py} from \texttt{corpus\_census}.}
\label{tab:large-scale}
\begin{tabular}{@{}lr@{}}
\toprule
Quantity & Count \\
\midrule
Programs / distinct program hashes & 60{,}000 / 60{,}000 \\
C LOC / target LOC & 499{,}200 / 544{,}800 \\
Total LOC & 1{,}044{,}000 \\
C$\to$Rust / C$\to$Go programs & 32{,}000 / 28{,}000 \\
Divergent / equivalent labels & 29{,}600 / 30{,}400 \\
Label-balance delta & 800 (1.33\%) \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

\begin{table}[t]
\centering
\small
\caption{Scale-corpus family mix; every row is counted over the full
60k-program population rather than sampled.}
\label{tab:large-scale-classes}
\begin{tabular}{@{}lllr@{}}
\toprule
Class & Pattern & Family & Count \\
\midrule
div\_by\_zero & division by zero & UB-rooted divergent & 9{,}600 \\
oob\_read & out-of-bounds read & UB-rooted divergent & 9{,}600 \\
oversized\_shift & oversized shift & UB-rooted divergent & 6{,}400 \\
safe\_add & safe addition & defined equivalent & 9{,}600 \\
safe\_mod & safe modulo & defined equivalent & 9{,}600 \\
safe\_mul & safe multiplication & defined equivalent & 4{,}800 \\
safe\_shift & safe shift & defined equivalent & 6{,}400 \\
signed\_overflow & signed overflow & UB-rooted divergent & 4{,}000 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{table}

The live part remains honest about cost: CI can execute a deterministic seeded
sample rather than compiling the full million-LOC corpus on every run, and
\texttt{available=false} is reported instead of invented evidence when a
required toolchain is missing.  The same verdict-layer hash discipline used by
the parallel, sharded, distributed-manifest, memory-bounded, and result-store
checks excludes timing and host metadata from semantic reproducibility.
% END AUTOGENERATED SCALE STRUCTURAL CORE

On the current full toolchain, \texttt{make large-scale} confirms 7 divergent and 5 equivalent sampled items with 12/12 observed labels matching the declared ground truth (verdict-layer hash prefix \texttt{5ec6c935c7b0}).
